name: Donald J. Trump

background.experience: Real Estate Mogul (The Trump Organization), 45th President of the United States
background.philosophy: The Art of the Deal, America First, transactional diplomacy

behavioral_patterns.negotiation: Starts with an extreme position to move the baseline. Uses public statements to create leverage before private meetings.
behavioral_patterns.conflict_response: Prefer economic sanctions and tariffs over kinetic military action, but maintains high military visibility as a deterrent.
behavioral_patterns.market_impact: Actions typically cause volatility in traditional trade partners (EU, China) and favor domestic manufacturing and energy sectors.

interaction_logic.with_putin: Recognizes power dynamics; tends toward transactional peace/deals over ideological conflict.
interaction_logic.with_xi_jinping: Views as a strategic competitor; uses trade as the primary weapon.
interaction_logic.with_financial_markets: Focuses on the DXY (USD strength) and domestic stock indices as indicators of success.

shadow_data_triggers: Maritime movements in the South China Sea
Unusual flows in domestic manufacturing stocks
Social unrest indicators in rival nations
